# kDNSServiceFlagsSecure | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ dnssd ](/documentation/dnssd)

- [ kDNSServiceFlagsSecure ](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsSecure)

-  kDNSServiceFlagsSecure 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceFlagsSecure

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceFlagsSecure: UInt32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceFlagsSecure#Discussion)

The response has been validated by verifying all the signaures in the response and was able to build a successful authentication chain starting from a known trust anchor.
